attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
        DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID,
        SALES_MOTION_CD,
        DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
        DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
        DV_OA_FLG,
        START_TV_DTM,
        END_TV_DTM,
        DV_SOURCE_TYPE,
   AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
   TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
   ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
   AS_TS_CODE,
   SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
   SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
        USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
        USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
        SRC_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID,
     PRODUCT_CLASS,
 TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
  HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
  RENEWAL_REF_ID,
 RENEWAL_REF_CD,
 SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
 SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
 MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
 REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
 SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
 SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
 OFFER_ATTRIB_PRDT_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_ERP_SMC_ATTRIB_SQ WI
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION MT
                    WHERE WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = MT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
                    AND WI.DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID = MT.DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID 
                    AND WI.START_TV_DTM = MT.START_TV_DTM
      )

SELECT  
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                 
,DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
,DV_EFFECTIVE_DTM              
,DV_EXPIRATION_DTM             
,SALES_MOTION_CD               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,SK_SQ_SOL_ALLOC_KEY           
,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT            
,AS_TS_CODE                    
,AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME          
,TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID           
,ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME     
,REASON_CODE                   
,MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG          
,COMMENTS                      
,CASE_NUMBER                   
,USER_ID                       
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC SQ
WHERE  SQ.DV_EXPIRATION_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SQ.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate')

SELECT 
SQ.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID      
,SQ.SALES_MOTION_CD               
,SQ.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
,'UNKNOWN' AS DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD
,'N'AS DV_OA_FLG                     
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DT                   
,'3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DT                     
,'SQ' AS DV_SOURCE_TYPE                
,CASE WHEN SQ. AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME = '' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
               WHEN SQ. AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
                ELSE SQ. AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME  END AS AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME
,CASE  WHEN SQ.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID = '' THEN 'UNKNWON'
                WHEN SQ.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'         
                 ELSE   SQ.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID END AS BK_AS_SUBTECHNOLOGY_NAME
,CASE WHEN SQ.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = '' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
              WHEN SQ.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
              ELSE SQ.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME END AS ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
, CASE WHEN AS_TS_CODE NOT IN ( 'AS', 'TS' ) THEN 'UNK' 
               WHEN AS_TS_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE AS_TS_CODE END AS AS_TS_CODE     
,-999 AS SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID     
,-999 AS SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,SQ.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT        
,NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS  SRC_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID     
,'UNKNOWN' AS PRODUCT_CLASS                 
,-999 AS TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY      
,-999 AS  HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY                
,'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_ID                
,'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_CD                
,REASON_CODE AS SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD    
,'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD        
,SQ.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG          
,COALESCE(NCW.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY 
,CASE WHEN SQ.CASE_NUMBER = '' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
               WHEN SQ.CASE_NUMBER IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
               ELSE SQ.CASE_NUMBER  END AS  SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM   
,SQ.COMMENTS AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT     
,-999 AS OFFER_ATTRIB_PRDT_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC SQ
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON SQ.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCW
ON NCW.CEC_ID = SQ.USER_ID 
AND NCW.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 

WHERE  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION OA
										WHERE SQ.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = OA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
